🧠 Modest ratings for this level; stepping up in class; strong recent form, on an improving trajectory; stamina pedigree (DI 0.3) in a sprint — mismatch (Starman), going conditions are ideal, has dwelt at the start before; good course record; market price confirms model confidence.
4 There's A Chance (IRE) ↑↑ 5 ·· Magna Grecia / Cadeaux Genereux ▼ 0.8 9-4 (-5) Kevin Stott Kevin Ryan 83 - 74187- 52.3 10.4% 9.6 9.5 4.00 -14.5pp
📰 Made a successful handicap debut at Hamilton (6f, good) last July off a 6lb lower mark and that form worked out nicely; ran in sales races on her final two starts in 2025, eighth of 21 at Naas and seventh of 14 at Goodwood (7f, good to soft); was challenging 1f out in the latter event before her stamina gave way; untried on AW and absent for 219 days but there could be more to come this year.
🧠 Modest ratings for this level; modest recent form, on an improving trajectory; breeding is a slight negative for these conditions (Magna Grecia); in-form trainer (Kevin Ryan); significant steamer today (6/1 → 10/3, 44% shorter); market price confirms model confidence.

🧠 Modest ratings for this level; on an improving trajectory, fit and race-ready; breeding is a slight negative for these conditions (No Nay Never), going conditions are ideal; good course record.

  {
    "course": "Newmarket",
    "time": "13:45",
    "race_name": "Darley EBF Maiden Fillies' Stakes (GBB/GBBPlus Race)",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "1m2f",
    "going": "Good",
    "class": "Class 2",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 4,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Earth Shot (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Tom Marquand",
        "trainer": "William Haggas",
        "ts": "56",
        "rpr": "92",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "2-",
        "sire": "Time Test",
        "dam_sire": "Nathaniel",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "62.9",
        "model_pct": "25.4%",
        "fair_odds": "3.94",
        "best_dec": "1.80",
        "edge": "-33.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Kept on for 2l second to even-money stablemate and fellow newcomer at Newbury (1m, soft) last October; this Oaks/Irish Oaks entry is bred to be suited by the step up in trip (dam 1m6f Group 3 winner); leading claims."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Velvet Vega",
        "jockey": "Benoit De La Sayette",
        "trainer": "John & Thady Gosden",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "-",
        "sire": "Lope De Vega",
        "dam_sire": "Sea The Stars",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "56.4",
        "model_pct": "18.3%",
        "fair_odds": "5.47",
        "best_dec": "3.75",
        "edge": "-8.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "240,000euros yearling; first foal; dam French 1m/9.5f winner (including Listed), sister to 1m4f winner Pappini, half-sister to French 7f Listed winner Lucie Manette, is granddaughter of Irish/Yorkshire Oaks winner Petrushka; this Lope De Vega newcomer is in top hands and could be a contender."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Malika (GB)",
        "jockey": "Oisin Murphy",
        "trainer": "Andrew Balding",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "74",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "4-",
        "sire": "Wootton Bassett",
        "dam_sire": "Holy Roman Emperor",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "53.3",
        "model_pct": "15.7%",
        "fair_odds": "6.38",
        "best_dec": "8.50",
        "edge": "+1.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "20-1 and no match for the front three when fourth of 13 on debut at Kempton (1m, AW) last November; others have achieved more but no surprise if she takes a sizeable step forward today for connections who won this last year."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Wild Violet",
        "jockey": "Hector Crouch",
        "trainer": "Michael Bell",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "-",
        "sire": "Zarak",
        "dam_sire": "No Nay Never",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "52.4",
        "model_pct": "14.9%",
        "fair_odds": "6.70",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "+6.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "First foal; dam 7f AW 2yo winner (RPR 79), half-sister to 2m/2m1f hurdle winner Kilcummin, out of French 9.7f winner; refused to enter stalls and withdrawn from intended debut at Newbury on April 17 (40-1 at the time)."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Blue Noon (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Joe Leavy",
        "trainer": "Richard Hannon",
        "ts": "46",
        "rpr": "82",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "4-",
        "sire": "Blue Point",
        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "46.9",
        "model_pct": "11.3%",
        "fair_odds": "8.81",
        "best_dec": "7.50",
        "edge": "-1.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Backed into 15-2 when promising fourth of 12 on debut at Leicester (7f, good to soft) last September; this 420,000euros sister to useful 1m winner Naepoint is open to improvement and could be in the mix if staying 1m2f."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Mokata",
        "jockey": "Sean D Bowen",
        "trainer": "Adam Kirby",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "57",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "0",
        "sire": "Mohaather",
        "dam_sire": "Sir Percy",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "40.9",
        "model_pct": "8.4%",
        "fair_odds": "11.93",
        "best_dec": "251.00",
        "edge": "+6.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Lost a lot of ground at the start when tenth of 11, beaten just under 13l, on debut at Yarmouth (1m, good; 125-1) three weeks ago; has since left Robert Eddery (remains in same ownership) and new trainer is in fine form; however, it's likely she remains best watched for now."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Anthena (GB)",
        "jockey": "Grace McEntee",
        "trainer": "Phil McEntee",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "18",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "9-",
        "sire": "Ulysses",
        "dam_sire": "Shamardal",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "34.4",
        "model_pct": "6.0%",
        "fair_odds": "16.58",
        "best_dec": "251.00",
        "edge": "+5.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Tailed off at 250-1 on debut at Southwell (7f, AW) last October; has since left Lawrence Mullaney (remains in same ownership); she would be a shock winner on stable debut."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Ascot",
    "time": "14:00",
    "race_name": "Ascot Shop Royal Ascot Two-Year-Old Trial EBF Conditions Stakes (GBB Race)",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "5f",
    "going": "Good To Firm",
    "class": "Class 2",
    "draw_bias": "high",
    "draw_strength": 4,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Adaay Of Scarlett",
        "jockey": "James Doyle",
        "trainer": "Hugo Palmer",
        "ts": "60",
        "rpr": "91",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "1",
        "sire": "Mehmas",
        "dam_sire": "Adaay",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "62.5",
        "model_pct": "40.3%",
        "fair_odds": "2.48",
        "best_dec": "2.20",
        "edge": "-12.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Mehmas colt who cost 110,000euros as a yearling; strong in the betting (11-8) and strong in the finish when completely dominating a 5f novice at Newmarket's Craven meeting (5f, good); Royal Ascot was talked about afterwards and this colt looks well above average already."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Dance A Jig",
        "jockey": "Rossa Ryan",
        "trainer": "Ralph Beckett",
        "ts": "84",
        "rpr": "88",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "2",
        "sire": "Naval Crown",
        "dam_sire": "Danehill Dancer",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "57.7",
        "model_pct": "26.6%",
        "fair_odds": "3.77",
        "best_dec": "3.00",
        "edge": "-11.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Home-bred 2yo who hails from a well-established sprinting family; got behind early in the Brocklesby (5f, good to soft; 6-1) but made up a significant amount of ground to give A Bear Affair something to think about; should be all the wiser this time and he's 3lb better off with the winner."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "A Bear Affair",
        "jockey": "Sean Levey",
        "trainer": "Richard Hannon",
        "ts": "84",
        "rpr": "88",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "1",
        "sire": "Kodi Bear",
        "dam_sire": "Bated Breath",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "56.6",
        "model_pct": "24.1%",
        "fair_odds": "4.15",
        "best_dec": "4.33",
        "edge": "-0.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "9-2 chance when fending off Dance A Jig by just under a length in the Brocklesby at Doncaster (5f, good to soft); showed a good attitude and the Hannon youngsters often improve with racing, but he does have to concede 3lb to the runner-up whose effort was a tad more eyecatching."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Crusherman",
        "jockey": "David Probert",
        "trainer": "Brian Meehan",
        "ts": "65",
        "rpr": "79",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "5",
        "sire": "Acclamation",
        "dam_sire": "Lord Of England",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "45.4",
        "model_pct": "9.0%",
        "fair_odds": "11.11",
        "best_dec": "21.00",
        "edge": "+4.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "52,000euros yearling; it looked a deep Newbury 5f maiden (good) in which he was beaten just over 3l and after racing prominently inexperience was evident when push came to shove; it was an encouraging start and juveniles from this yard are renowned for improving on their debut efforts."
      }
    ]
  },

  {
    "course": "Newmarket",
    "time": "14:20",
    "race_name": "JCB Newmarket Stakes (Listed Race) (Colts & Geldings)",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "1m2f",
    "going": "Good",
    "class": "Class 1",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 4,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Poseidon's Warrior (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Billy Loughnane",
        "trainer": "Charlie Appleby",
        "ts": "106",
        "rpr": "118",
        "or": "109",
        "form": "21-2",
        "sire": "Sea The Stars",
        "dam_sire": "Holy Roman Emperor",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "69.9",
        "model_pct": "36.5%",
        "fair_odds": "2.74",
        "best_dec": "1.80",
        "edge": "-22.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Easy win at Goodwood (1m1f, good) last October on second start and he reappeared with a 1l Listed second here (1m1f, good) 16 days ago, staying on well; the first-time hood could help him settle better and he holds leading claims for top trainer who has won three of the last four runnings."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "My Love Is King (GB)",
        "jockey": "Oisin Murphy",
        "trainer": "John & Thady Gosden",
        "ts": "105",
        "rpr": "109",
        "or": "95",
        "form": "1-2",
        "sire": "Kingman",
        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "65.9",
        "model_pct": "24.7%",
        "fair_odds": "4.04",
        "best_dec": "4.00",
        "edge": "-2.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won last November on sole 2yo start (7f, AW) and reappeared with a near-miss in a hot novice contest at Newbury (1m2f, good) a fortnight ago; this Dante/Derby entry is from a classy family and should continue to progress for his top stable; could have a part to play."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Lyneham (IRE)",
        "jockey": "David Egan",
        "trainer": "Ralph Beckett",
        "ts": "94",
        "rpr": "106",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "21-",
        "sire": "Wootton Bassett",
        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "63.7",
        "model_pct": "19.8%",
        "fair_odds": "5.04",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "+5.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Went close on debut at Doncaster (1m, soft) last September then kept on well to win a 1m maiden here (good) in October; this is a much stiffer test of his credentials but his dam is from a classy family and he's in excellent hands; entered in the Dante and Derby and could be set for big 3yo campaign."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Archers Bay (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Tom Marquand",
        "trainer": "Marco Botti",
        "ts": "100",
        "rpr": "108",
        "or": "93",
        "form": "8431-1",
        "sire": "Wootton Bassett",
        "dam_sire": "Foxwedge",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "59.6",
        "model_pct": "13.2%",
        "fair_odds": "7.57",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "+5.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ex-Ballydoyle colt who got off the mark in first-time cheekpieces (retained since) on his stable debut in a Wolverhampton novice (9.4f, AW) in December and followed up over this C&D (good) 16 days ago on his first handicap start; could continue to progress but does need another step forward today."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Ancient Egypt (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Rowan Scott",
        "trainer": "Charlie Johnston",
        "ts": "88",
        "rpr": "107",
        "or": "93",
        "form": "117-",
        "sire": "Frankel",
        "dam_sire": "Oasis Dream",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "51.1",
        "model_pct": "5.8%",
        "fair_odds": "17.38",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "-0.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won fast-ground novice races at Beverley (7.4f) and Goodwood (1m) last summer on his first two starts; he's better than he showed when 14l seventh of eight in the Group 2 Royal Lodge here in September (1m, good to firm; 16-1) and has Dante/Derby entries but others have more pressing claims."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Ascot",
    "time": "14:35",
    "race_name": "Longines Sagaro Stakes (Group 3) (A Gold Cup Trial)",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "2m",
    "going": "Good To Firm",
    "class": "Class 1",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 4,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Sweet William (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Robert Havlin",
        "trainer": "John & Thady Gosden",
        "ts": "126",
        "rpr": "125",
        "or": "117",
        "form": "43212-",
        "sire": "Sea The Stars",
        "dam_sire": "Shirocco",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "69.8",
        "model_pct": "26.4%",
        "fair_odds": "3.79",
        "best_dec": "2.75",
        "edge": "-14.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Headgear and Rab Havlin all starts; not straightforward but he nearly always gives his running, including at this track; he did not have the top stayers to worry about last September when winning his second Doncaster Cup and the same seems to apply today, so he's a leading player."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Caballo De Mar (IRE)",
        "jockey": "William Buick",
        "trainer": "George Scott",
        "ts": "100",
        "rpr": "120",
        "or": "114",
        "form": "8117-2",
        "sire": "Phoenix Of Spain",
        "dam_sire": "Holy Roman Emperor",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-11",
        "score": "65.1",
        "model_pct": "16.0%",
        "fair_odds": "6.25",
        "best_dec": "6.50",
        "edge": "-1.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Much improved last year, best effort to land the Group 1 Cadran at Longchamp (2m4f, soft) in October; close second in the Dubai Gold Cup at Meydan (2m, good) was a fine start to this campaign and his run on good to firm at Royal Ascot last June, although subsequently eclipsed, looked excellent at the time; needs respect but concedes weight all round."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Miss Alpilles (GB)",
        "jockey": "Kieran Shoemark",
        "trainer": "Ed Walker",
        "ts": "96",
        "rpr": "115",
        "or": "98",
        "form": "50211-",
        "sire": "Sea The Stars",
        "dam_sire": "Invincible Spirit",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "63.5",
        "model_pct": "13.4%",
        "fair_odds": "7.46",
        "best_dec": "19.00",
        "edge": "+7.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won 1m6f handicap at Goodwood (good to firm) last August and a first crack at 2m suited her even better when she led over 1f out to score at 20-1 in a Listed race at Newmarket (good) in September; today's Group 3 should demand plenty more but she could still have untapped potential at 2m+."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Tarriance (GB)",
        "jockey": "Colin Keane",
        "trainer": "Andrew Balding",
        "ts": "116",
        "rpr": "117",
        "or": "105",
        "form": "2117-3",
        "sire": "Frankel",
        "dam_sire": "Oasis Dream",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "60.6",
        "model_pct": "9.8%",
        "fair_odds": "10.19",
        "best_dec": "6.00",
        "edge": "-7.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won the Melrose Handicap at York (1m6f, good to firm) last August, before the St Leger proved too tough; gelded soon after and ran well when third in Saudi Arabia (1m7f) in February; runner-up Tabletalk conceded him 11lb that day and it's only 1lb today, but this 4yo should retain potential for 2m+."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Beylerbeyi",
        "jockey": "Ryan Moore",
        "trainer": "Ian Williams",
        "ts": "105",
        "rpr": "118",
        "or": "101",
        "form": "1-3223",
        "sire": "Invincible Spirit",
        "dam_sire": "Shamardal",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "60.5",
        "model_pct": "9.7%",
        "fair_odds": "10.33",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "+2.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won the 2m2f Cesarewitch in October and has run well in defeat on AW in his four starts (1m2f, 1m3f and 2m) this January-April; keeps catching the eye with his late gains from off the pace and might still have more to give, but today's move out of handicaps certainly requires it."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Tabletalk (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Rossa Ryan",
        "trainer": "Tom Clover",
        "ts": "112",
        "rpr": "123",
        "or": "113",
        "form": "2632-2",
        "sire": "Camelot",
        "dam_sire": "Holy Roman Emperor",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "60.1",
        "model_pct": "9.3%",
        "fair_odds": "10.76",
        "best_dec": "6.00",
        "edge": "-7.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "No win since Melrose Handicap at York (1m6f, good to firm) in 2024 but he ran very well in 1m4f Group races on first three starts last season and returned to that form when a close second in Saudi Arabia (1m7f) 11 weeks ago; that puts him back in the picture even though he's unraced over this far."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Ascending (IRE)",
        "jockey": "W J Lee",
        "trainer": "Henry De Bromhead",
        "ts": "97",
        "rpr": "117",
        "or": "101",
        "form": "/1126-",
        "sire": "Awtaad",
        "dam_sire": "Night Shift",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "57.7",
        "model_pct": "7.1%",
        "fair_odds": "14.01",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-1.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Landed the Cork Derby (1m4f) last May and a Royal Ascot handicap (2m4f) last June, before his excellent second in the Ebor Handicap at York (1m6f) in August; not disgraced on final start but needs a serious advance to mix it with the best of these in today's Group 3."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Dubai Future (GB)",
        "jockey": "David Probert",
        "trainer": "Saeed bin Suroor",
        "ts": "108",
        "rpr": "119",
        "or": "110",
        "form": "9366-8",
        "sire": "Dubawi",
        "dam_sire": "Street Cry",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "56.5",
        "model_pct": "6.3%",
        "fair_odds": "15.85",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "-0.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Has delivered smart efforts almost every season since 2020 (missed 2024) and last year's win in the 2m Dubai Gold Cup at Meydan was one of his best; that campaign went the wrong way and he did not perk up when returning for Dubai Gold Cup (20-1) five weeks ago, but holds a cracking chance if returning to his best."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Deira Mile",
        "jockey": "Dougie Costello",
        "trainer": "Jessica Bedi",
        "ts": "90",
        "rpr": "117",
        "or": "111",
        "form": "24/68-",
        "sire": "Camelot",
        "dam_sire": "Fastnet Rock",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "45.7",
        "model_pct": "2.0%",
        "fair_odds": "51.00",
        "best_dec": "151.00",
        "edge": "+2.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "A novice event remains his only win from ten races but he was fourth in the 2024 Derby and St Leger; well held in Saudi Arabia and Dubai on his only two starts last year, left Owen Burrows for 16,000gns last October and gelded last month; some caution has to be advised."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Goodwood",
    "time": "14:40",

    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,

        "stall": 2,

        "fair_odds": "2.13",
        "best_dec": "1.91",
        "edge": "-15.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "A useful 7f/1m winner at 2yrs and he has acquitted himself well in Qatar and Meydan over the winter, runner-up in 1m Listed event in February; he holds solid form claims."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Protection Act (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Pat Cosgrave",
        "trainer": "George Boughey",
        "ts": "95",
        "rpr": "106",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "1-",
        "sire": "Starspangledbanner",
        "dam_sire": "Azamour",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "59.9",
        "model_pct": "27.4%",
        "fair_odds": "3.65",
        "best_dec": "4.50",
        "edge": "+2.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "5-1, impressed when going in at the first time of asking in novice at Haydock (7f, good) last July, showing a good turn of foot; off since but this son of Starspangledbanner remains with plenty of potential."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Pathein (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Daniel Muscutt",
        "trainer": "Ed Dunlop",
        "ts": "91",
        "rpr": "109",
        "or": "103",
        "form": "15-",
        "sire": "St Mark's Basilica",
        "dam_sire": "Shamardal",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "54.1",
        "model_pct": "13.6%",
        "fair_odds": "7.34",
        "best_dec": "4.33",
        "edge": "-10.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Son of St Mark's Basilica who created a good impression when making a winning start in 1m Doncaster maiden in September; built on that form when fifth of seven in Newmarket's Autumn Stakes (1m) following month, fading only late on; big shout with better still to come."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Allegresse (GB)",
        "jockey": "Rob Hornby",
        "trainer": "Andrew Balding",
        "ts": "86",
        "rpr": "99",
        "or": "93",
        "form": "2117-",
        "sire": "Oasis Dream",
        "dam_sire": "Archipenko",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "53.1",
        "model_pct": "12.1%",
        "fair_odds": "8.29",
        "best_dec": "9.00",
        "edge": "+0.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Looked on the up when making all in a pair of 1m Kempton novices in the autumn but he failed to get home when beating only one in Zetland Stakes at Newmarket (1m2f) on final 2yo run; since gelded and it would come as no surprise to see this son of Oasis Dream bounce back."
      }
    ]
  },

  {
    "course": "Newmarket",
    "time": "14:55",

    "draw_bias": "stands_side",

    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Zennor Storm (GB)",

        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "93",
        "or": "91",

        "dam_sire": "Diamond Green",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-10",
        "score": "61.7",
        "model_pct": "20.2%",
        "fair_odds": "4.94",
        "best_dec": "7.50",
        "edge": "+4.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won on debut at Kempton (7f, AW) last October and followed up there (1m, AW) in December; his opening mark is no gift but it remains to be seen where his limitations lie and he's respected for his top yard on turf debut."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Fort Rock (GB)",
        "jockey": "Connor Planas(3)",
        "trainer": "Charlie Appleby",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "96",
        "or": "90",
        "form": "11-",
        "sire": "Wootton Bassett",
        "dam_sire": "Dubawi",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "61.0",
        "model_pct": "17.9%",
        "fair_odds": "5.59",
        "best_dec": "4.33",
        "edge": "-5.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won over 7f on Kempton AW last autumn on his first two starts; those were narrow victories and improvement is needed on this handicap debut if he's to remain unbeaten, but he could have plenty more to offer for his top trainer, especially over this extra furlong."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Objector (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Hector Crouch",
        "trainer": "George Scott",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "94",
        "or": "90",
        "form": "1-1",
        "sire": "Dark Angel",
        "dam_sire": "Kheleyf",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "60.4",
        "model_pct": "16.2%",
        "fair_odds": "6.16",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "+5.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "3l win on debut at Wolverhampton (8.6f, AW) in December and had 11l to spare when 1-8 there in January (8.6f); faces much tougher calibre of opponent on this first handicap start but he's brother to a Group 3 winner and his trainer is eyeing up a Royal Ascot handicap; could give a good account."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Comic Hero",
        "jockey": "Oisin Murphy",
        "trainer": "Andrew Balding",
        "ts": "90",
        "rpr": "95",
        "or": "78",
        "form": "732-15",
        "sire": "Saxon Warrior",
        "dam_sire": "Dark Angel",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "8-11",
        "score": "60.1",
        "model_pct": "15.3%",
        "fair_odds": "6.54",
        "best_dec": "7.50",
        "edge": "+0.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Went close in two fast-ground novice races last summer and returned with a novice win at Kempton (7f, AW) in February; 15-8 favourite and denied a clear run when 2l fifth of six on handicap debut at Musselburgh (1m, good to soft) four weeks ago; retains potential and is not ruled out but he lost places close home once in the clear at Musselburgh and has to raise his game."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Royal Bodyguard (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Silvestre De Sousa",
        "trainer": "Michael Bell",
        "ts": "84",
        "rpr": "96",
        "or": "71",
        "form": "33132-",
        "sire": "Kodi Bear",
        "dam_sire": "Lawman",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "8-4",
        "score": "56.4",
        "model_pct": "8.0%",
        "fair_odds": "12.54",
        "best_dec": "29.00",
        "edge": "+2.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ran seven times last year and sole win came in four-runner nursery at Kempton (1m, AW); also effective on turf and gelded since last seen; however, unless he finds improvement he's vulnerable to less-exposed types."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "St Anton (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Joe Leavy",
        "trainer": "Richard Hannon",
        "ts": "95",
        "rpr": "100",
        "or": "82",
        "form": "322-3",
        "sire": "Mehmas",
        "dam_sire": "Sea The Stars",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "55.6",
        "model_pct": "6.9%",
        "fair_odds": "14.44",
        "best_dec": "6.50",
        "edge": "-9.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Runner-up on final two of his three 2yo starts (7f/1m, good to soft/good) and improved form on recent seasonal/handicap debut when close third over C&D (good); well regarded and open to further improvement; one to consider."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Lake Como",
        "jockey": "Billy Loughnane",
        "trainer": "George Boughey",
        "ts": "47",
        "rpr": "103",
        "or": "89",
        "form": "8211-3",
        "sire": "St Mark's Basilica",
        "dam_sire": "Nayef",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "55.5",
        "model_pct": "6.8%",
        "fair_odds": "14.69",
        "best_dec": "6.00",
        "edge": "-10.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won Newcastle novice (7f, AW) in December on fourth start and followed up in four-runner nursery at Southwell (1m, AW); returned from break with 50-1 third in warm conditions race at Kempton (1m, AW) in March, when conceding weight all round, and on that evidence he looks well treated off an unchanged mark; down the field on sole turf start but that was his debut last June."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Elan d'Or (GB)",
        "jockey": "Clifford Lee",
        "trainer": "Stuart Williams",
        "ts": "76",
        "rpr": "94",
        "or": "89",
        "form": "02211-",
        "sire": "Without Parole",
        "dam_sire": "Oasis Dream",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "53.5",
        "model_pct": "4.8%",
        "fair_odds": "20.88",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "-2.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Got off the mark at the eighth attempt in Chelmsford nursery (7f, AW) last November on his second AW start, and he again had plenty in hand when following up at Kempton (1m, AW); needs to transfer that improvement back to turf but he did show promise on grass last season; not ruled out."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Vincenzo Peruggia",

        "trainer": "Charlie Johnston",
        "ts": "92",

        "fair_odds": "26.16",
        "best_dec": "8.50",
        "edge": "-8.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won at Beverley (7.4f, good to firm) last July on second start then well beaten in Group 2 at Goodwood (7f, good) later that month; reappeared with close second of six in handicap at Musselburgh (1m, good to soft) four weeks ago but it's likely he needs a much bigger run in this hot contest."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Ascot",
    "time": "15:10",
    "race_name": "Commonwealth Cup Trial Stakes (Registered As The Pavilion Stakes) (Group 3)",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "6f",
    "going": "Good To Firm",
    "class": "Class 1",
    "draw_bias": "high",
    "draw_strength": 4,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Wise Approach (IRE)",
        "jockey": "William Buick",
        "trainer": "Charlie Appleby",
        "ts": "100",
        "rpr": "116",
        "or": "115",
        "form": "42131-",
        "sire": "Mehmas",
        "dam_sire": "Frozen Power",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "69.9",
        "model_pct": "32.0%",
        "fair_odds": "3.12",
        "best_dec": "2.10",
        "edge": "-14.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "On the up when last seen, rounding off his 2yo campaign with a comfortable come-from-behind win in the Middle Park in September (6f, good to firm); may confirm his superiority over Brussels and Coppull despite the weights turnaround and he is not fully exposed just yet."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Brussels (GB)",
        "jockey": "Ryan Moore",
        "trainer": "A P O'Brien",
        "ts": "105",
        "rpr": "115",
        "or": "110",
        "form": "24222-",
        "sire": "Wootton Bassett",
        "dam_sire": "Shamardal",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "66.6",
        "model_pct": "21.9%",
        "fair_odds": "4.57",
        "best_dec": "4.50",
        "edge": "-4.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won a 6f maiden at the Curragh on debut before a string of good efforts in defeat in good races, notably second-place finishes in the Middle Park (0.75l behind Wise Approach and 5lb better off) and the Breeders' Cup Juvenile Turf Sprint; should be in the shake-up."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Division (GB)",
        "jockey": "James Doyle",
        "trainer": "William Haggas",
        "ts": "100",
        "rpr": "104",
        "or": "103",
        "form": "21115-",
        "sire": "Kingman",
        "dam_sire": "Sir Prancealot",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "60.5",
        "model_pct": "10.8%",
        "fair_odds": "9.30",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "+4.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Promise on good to firm on debut; won his next three starts, two novice events and a York Listed race, before pulling his chance away over C&D on Champions Day; improvement required now upped to a Group 3 but he's in excellent hands and still has some potential."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Coppull (GB)",
        "jockey": "Rossa Ryan",
        "trainer": "Clive Cox",
        "ts": "111",
        "rpr": "111",
        "or": "110",
        "form": "13153-",
        "sire": "Bated Breath",
        "dam_sire": "Mayson",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "60.1",
        "model_pct": "10.3%",
        "fair_odds": "9.71",
        "best_dec": "6.00",
        "edge": "-7.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Third in the Coventry Stakes over C&D before winning the Group 2 Richmond Stakes at Glorious Goodwood (6f, good); rounded off his juvenile campaign with a close third in the Group 1 Middle Park Stakes (6f, good to firm), finishing on the heels of the reopposing Wise Approach and Brussels; stable won this race with Jasour, also a Group 2 winner as a 2yo, in 2024; one to take seriously."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Ghost Mode (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Colin Keane",
        "trainer": "Andrew Balding",
        "ts": "92",
        "rpr": "102",
        "or": "98",
        "form": "3212-1",
        "sire": "Ghaiyyath",
        "dam_sire": "Camacho",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "59.6",
        "model_pct": "9.7%",
        "fair_odds": "10.30",
        "best_dec": "9.50",
        "edge": "-0.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Five runs as a 2yo; made debut over 6f but campaigned at 7f afterwards, running away with a maiden at Chester (good to soft) before a good second in a York sales race last October; absent for five months prior to a facile success in a 6f handicap at Southwell in March, racing freely and hanging left in the straight but in a different class to some fair handicappers; in much deeper today and looks to face a stiff task at the weights but the Southwell performance smacked of a hugely talented, if slightly wayward, colt and this stiff 6f should suit; unraced on faster than good."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Ardisia (IRE)",
        "jockey": "David Probert",
        "trainer": "Hugo Palmer",
        "ts": "111",
        "rpr": "110",
        "or": "106",
        "form": "1127-7",
        "sire": "Ardad",
        "dam_sire": "Tamayuz",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "56.9",
        "model_pct": "7.0%",
        "fair_odds": "14.20",
        "best_dec": "21.00",
        "edge": "+1.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Progressive as a 2yo, winning five times and also second of 11 in the 2yo race over C&D on Champions Day; should appreciate the return to a stiff 6f having weakened over 7f in the Greenham two weeks ago; one to consider."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Crown Relic",
        "jockey": "Shane Foley",
        "trainer": "K R Burke",
        "ts": "73",
        "rpr": "104",
        "or": "99",
        "form": "115",
        "sire": "Kingman",
        "dam_sire": "Frankel",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "53.4",
        "model_pct": "4.7%",
        "fair_odds": "21.44",
        "best_dec": "34.00",
        "edge": "+1.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "All races at 7f, winning a maiden and a novice at Wolverhampton in good style before his creditable fifth in a Deauville Group 3 last month (good to soft); drops in trip with a tongue-tie added for a trainer who this in 2020 and 2023."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Midnight Tango (GB)",
        "jockey": "Kieran Shoemark",
        "trainer": "Ed Walker",
        "ts": "95",
        "rpr": "99",
        "or": "96",
        "form": "24460-",
        "sire": "Night Of Thunder",
        "dam_sire": "Lope De Vega",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "51.2",
        "model_pct": "3.6%",
        "fair_odds": "27.49",
        "best_dec": "41.00",
        "edge": "+1.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ran well in Listed/Group 3 company last summer following her maiden win at Hamilton and her two lesser efforts at the end of the campaign can both be excused; this free-going filly shouldn't mind the return to sprinting but she will need to raise her game a notch."
      }
    ]
  },

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "A fairly useful 5f winner at 2yrs for Peter Chapple-Hyam; also scored three times in France/Italy in 2025 (signed off with 5f Listed success in Milan); since gelded and he can't be ruled out now starting out with Archie Watson."
      },
      {

        "rpr": "113",

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ended 2025 better than ever (cheekpieces on and tongue tied) with Haydock victory and fourth at Ascot (both 5f); yard is going well so he's very much one to consider on his return."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,

        "edge": "-3.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Useful front-runner who returned with a good third in 5f AW listed event at Lingfield in February; not at his best on soft ground at Musselburgh since but can bounce back here."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,

        "edge": "-4.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "A three-time winner (around 6f) last season but he ended the term with a rare poor effort in the Portland at Doncaster in September; has gone well fresh though so no surprise to see him bounce back here."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Notched three 5f handicaps in 2025 and he has continued in decent form this season, fifth of 14 at Musselburgh last month; ought to be thereabouts once more off an easing mark."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Bagged 5f York listed event last May; off seven months/gelded before posting an encouraging eighth of 14 in 5f Musselburgh handicap 27 days ago, nearest finish having lost ground when hampered soon after start; not without interest off a reduced mark."

        "best_dec": "26.00",
        "edge": "+1.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "A useful 5f winner in the US in 2024; failed to fire for Joseph O'Brien subsequently and twice finished runner-up for Olly Murphy in Saint Moritz in February; starts out for another new yard here."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,
        "horse": "Rosario (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Lewis Edmunds",
        "trainer": "Roger Teal",
        "ts": "106",
        "rpr": "117",
        "or": "92",
        "form": "3203-6",
        "sire": "Harry Angel",
        "dam_sire": "Grand Reward",
        "stall": 11,
        "weight": "8-11",
        "score": "52.9",
        "model_pct": "5.2%",
        "fair_odds": "19.04",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "-6.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Captured this prize last year and largely in good form after, despite his customary slow starts; should strip sharper for his reappearance sixth in 5f Newmarket handicap 17 days ago so he's no forlorn hope in refitted cheekpieces."
      },
      {
        "rank": 11,
        "horse": "Clearpoint",
        "jockey": "Alistair Rawlinson",
        "trainer": "Simon Hodgson",
        "ts": "82",
        "rpr": "116",
        "or": "100",
        "form": "112-22",
        "sire": "Ardad",
        "dam_sire": "Harbour Watch",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "52.6",
        "model_pct": "5.0%",
        "fair_odds": "20.01",
        "best_dec": "9.50",
        "edge": "-4.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Completed a 5f AW hat-trick last backend and has continued in fine form this spring, runner-up in 5f Southwell handicap last time; must enter calculations back on turf."
      }
    ]
  },

  {
    "course": "Newmarket",
    "time": "15:30",
    "race_name": "Betfred Jockey Club Stakes (Group 2)",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "1m4f",
    "going": "Good",
    "class": "Class 1",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 4,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Bay City Roller",
        "jockey": "Billy Loughnane",
        "trainer": "George Scott",
        "ts": "110",
        "rpr": "125",
        "or": "117",
        "form": "62241-",
        "sire": "New Bay",
        "dam_sire": "Teofilo",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "68.7",
        "model_pct": "35.7%",
        "fair_odds": "2.80",
        "best_dec": "4.00",
        "edge": "+7.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Sole start on good to firm was his debut win; highly reliable since and progressive too overall, taking his form to the next level when landing Group 1 by 7l at Munich (1m4f, soft; his only win last season) in November when last seen; form chance but that's based on the soft-ground performance."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Santorini Star (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Tom Marquand",
        "trainer": "William Haggas",
        "ts": "117",
        "rpr": "123",
        "or": "107",
        "form": "44112-",
        "sire": "Golden Horn",
        "dam_sire": "Teofilo",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "65.8",
        "model_pct": "20.3%",
        "fair_odds": "4.92",
        "best_dec": "6.50",
        "edge": "+2.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Upped to 2m for a handicap win at York Ebor meeting (good to firm) last August; tried front-running to positive effect against her own sex over about 1m6f on her subsequent two starts when winning the Group 2 Park Hill at Doncaster (good to soft) and second in Group 1 at Longchamp (very soft); has a form chance on this return but the stayer's mantle will have to be shed."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Eydon (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Oisin Murphy",
        "trainer": "Andrew Balding",
        "ts": "86",
        "rpr": "125",
        "or": "114",
        "form": "21410-",
        "sire": "Olden Times",
        "dam_sire": "Frankel",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "63.5",
        "model_pct": "12.9%",
        "fair_odds": "7.75",
        "best_dec": "6.00",
        "edge": "-3.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Had 1m4f wins last season in a Group 3 at Newbury (good to firm) in May and Group 2 in Italy (good; made all for career-best form) in October; tailed off in Hong Kong on final start but has a shout if back to his best."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "French Master (IRE)",
        "jockey": "David Egan",
        "trainer": "John & Thady Gosden",
        "ts": "113",
        "rpr": "122",
        "or": "108",
        "form": "21150-",
        "sire": "Frankel",
        "dam_sire": "Sea The Stars",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "62.0",
        "model_pct": "9.7%",
        "fair_odds": "10.31",
        "best_dec": "5.50",
        "edge": "-8.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won two 1m6f handicaps last term, latterly in taking style from off the pace at Royal Ascot (good to firm) when blinkered first time; slowly away on both subsequent starts, looking as if he was stretched by 2m in the Group 1 Goodwood Cup on first occasion (creditable) but tailed-off second favourite in the Ebor last time (visored; raced wide and made most); back to 1m4f, with headgear removed and needs overall improvement but the gelding operation may have helped."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Paradias",
        "jockey": "Hector Crouch",
        "trainer": "Alan King",
        "ts": "78",
        "rpr": "119",
        "or": "105",
        "form": "42-313",
        "sire": "Kodiac",
        "dam_sire": "Red Ransom",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "61.9",
        "model_pct": "9.5%",
        "fair_odds": "10.51",
        "best_dec": "19.00",
        "edge": "+4.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "In the form of his life this winter with a win at Lingfield (1m4f) in February and close calls in his other three outings; those were on AW, which does seem to suit him particularly well, and also in handicaps, which leaves him with something to find in his first Group venture."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Lion's Pride (GB)",
        "jockey": "Benoit De La Sayette",
        "trainer": "John & Thady Gosden",
        "ts": "97",
        "rpr": "123",
        "or": "110",
        "form": "615-64",
        "sire": "Roaring Lion",
        "dam_sire": "Lemon Drop Kid",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "61.4",
        "model_pct": "8.7%",
        "fair_odds": "11.44",
        "best_dec": "5.00",
        "edge": "-13.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "7l Listed win over C&D (good to firm) last September; there are also plenty of lesser shows to be considered and, after he was not discredited in Qatar in February, he managed only fourth of six when favourite for Group 3 at Newbury 13 days ago; in the mix on peak efforts."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Sunway (FR)",
        "jockey": "Silvestre De Sousa",
        "trainer": "David Menuisier",
        "ts": "112",
        "rpr": "124",
        "or": "112",
        "form": "46-120",
        "sire": "Galiway",
        "dam_sire": "Kendargent",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "56.2",
        "model_pct": "3.1%",
        "fair_odds": "31.71",
        "best_dec": "9.00",
        "edge": "-7.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Peak efforts were as a 3yo but reappearance at Meydan this January saw his first win since 2023; nearly won another 1m6f Group 3 there next time, before a headstrong display (set up big lead) saw him tail off in 2m Dubai Gold Cup five weeks ago; the latter was in blinkers (first time since September) which are unsurprisingly left off today; thereabouts if bouncing back."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Ascot",
    "time": "15:45",
    "race_name": "Memberships At Ascot Paradise Stakes (Listed Race) (A Queen Anne Stakes Trial)",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "1m",
    "going": "Good To Firm",
    "class": "Class 1",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 4,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Remmooz (GB)",
        "jockey": "Callum Rodriguez",
        "trainer": "Owen Burrows",
        "ts": "92",
        "rpr": "119",
        "or": "109",
        "form": "14131-",
        "sire": "Blue Point",
        "dam_sire": "Ramonti",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "71.0",
        "model_pct": "24.0%",
        "fair_odds": "4.17",
        "best_dec": "4.50",
        "edge": "+0.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Group 3 Jersey at Royal Ascot last June was the only time he's failed to improve his rating in six-race career but even then he managed fourth of 15; close third in handicap at York Ebor meeting (1m, good to firm) preceded win number four in a 7f Listed race at Newbury; while better is needed in this Group 3, he looks the type to find it in this second season."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Chancellor",
        "jockey": "Robert Havlin",
        "trainer": "John & Thady Gosden",
        "ts": "76",
        "rpr": "123",
        "or": "109",
        "form": "12-125",
        "sire": "Kingman",
        "dam_sire": "Dansili",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "67.9",
        "model_pct": "17.3%",
        "fair_odds": "5.78",
        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "+8.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Had wind surgery last May and gelded last June; returned to action with five races in November-April which left his turf form way behind, particularly those at 1m; ran respectably in first-time cheekpieces on latest outing; player on that AW form but return to turf asks a question."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Holloway Boy (GB)",
        "jockey": "William Buick",
        "trainer": "K R Burke",
        "ts": "104",
        "rpr": "124",
        "or": "112",
        "form": "1-5323",
        "sire": "Ulysses",
        "dam_sire": "Pivotal",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "67.0",
        "model_pct": "15.7%",
        "fair_odds": "6.36",
        "best_dec": "6.50",
        "edge": "-1.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "His strike-rate is an unimpressive 3-26 but he's seldom far away and last October's excellent second in a top handicap over C&D preceded an AW Listed win; came up short at Doha and Meydan early this year but showed enough to suggest he should be on the premises."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Jonquil (GB)",
        "jockey": "Colin Keane",
        "trainer": "Andrew Balding",
        "ts": "110",
        "rpr": "126",
        "or": "113",
        "form": "5149-7",
        "sire": "Lope De Vega",
        "dam_sire": "Dubawi",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "64.2",
        "model_pct": "11.7%",
        "fair_odds": "8.57",
        "best_dec": "4.50",
        "edge": "-10.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "2025 seemed to establish that he's better over 1m than 6f or 7f and the best of those efforts, including at the top level, give him a good chance in today's company; reappearance in Abu Dhabi in February was not of the same order but he could bounce back."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Bowmark (GB)",
        "jockey": "Ryan Moore",
        "trainer": "John & Thady Gosden",
        "ts": "102",
        "rpr": "118",
        "or": "103",
        "form": "/2108-",
        "sire": "Kingman",
        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "63.8",
        "model_pct": "11.2%",
        "fair_odds": "8.91",
        "best_dec": "9.00",
        "edge": "+0.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Lightly raced 4yo from top yard; headstrong up front in the Group 1 Prix du Jockey Club (10.5f) last June and also failed to settle when held up in York Group 3 (1m1f) last August on his only subsequent start; returns to 1m for reappearance but whether he's calmed down after being gelded may be the key."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Seacruiser",
        "jockey": "Rossa Ryan",
        "trainer": "Ralph Beckett",
        "ts": "90",
        "rpr": "111",
        "or": "100",
        "form": "51/3",
        "sire": "Sea The Stars",
        "dam_sire": "Iffraaj",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "59.9",
        "model_pct": "7.4%",
        "fair_odds": "13.58",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "-0.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Looked a good prospect when making all in a 1m Newmarket maiden (good to soft) in September 2024; reappeared only three weeks ago but made eye-catching late gains to finish a close third in that strong conditions stakes at Thirsk (7f, good; 12-1); this race demands far more but return to 1m (he looks bred for further still) will help and he should be capable of better."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Naqeeb (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Ryan Sexton",
        "trainer": "Julie Camacho",
        "ts": "103",
        "rpr": "119",
        "or": "110",
        "form": "38281-",
        "sire": "Nathaniel",
        "dam_sire": "Kingmambo",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "55.1",
        "model_pct": "4.5%",
        "fair_odds": "22.36",
        "best_dec": "34.00",
        "edge": "+1.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Has raced as far as 2m1f in 2024 and never shorter than 1m2f; third at last year's Royal Ascot came over 1m4f but he broke a losing sequence when diverted from top handicaps to a 1m2f Listed race at Goodwood last September; the prospect of 1m now doesn't seem so ridiculous but a career best is needed."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Rashabar (IRE)",
        "jockey": "James Doyle",
        "trainer": "Brian Meehan",
        "ts": "105",
        "rpr": "121",
        "or": "112",
        "form": "42240-",
        "sire": "Holy Roman Emperor",
        "dam_sire": "Camelot",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "55.0",
        "model_pct": "4.4%",
        "fair_odds": "22.79",
        "best_dec": "7.00",
        "edge": "-10.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "The 2024 Coventry at Royal Ascot as 2yo remains his only win; runner-up to Jonquil on 2025 reappearance and ran creditably at 1m/1m2f on most subsequent starts, before a fruitless go at 1m4f at the Breeders' Cup in USA; each-way chance if he's tuned up but yard is not yet off the mark this term."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "La Botte",
        "jockey": "Jamie Spencer",
        "trainer": "Harry Eustace",
        "ts": "96",
        "rpr": "120",
        "or": "104",
        "form": "142-40",
        "sire": "Too Darn Hot",
        "dam_sire": "Lawman",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "53.8",
        "model_pct": "3.9%",
        "fair_odds": "25.88",
        "best_dec": "7.50",
        "edge": "-9.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Went close in the Britannia at Royal Ascot (1m, good to firm) last June on his fourth start; not seen again until a good fourth at Wolverhampton (8.6f, AW) this March, despite a slow start and having to come very wide in the straight; disappointing favourite in the Lincoln at Doncaster three weeks later, perhaps with the good to soft ground against him but overall improvement is required moving from handicaps into this Group 3."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Goodwood",

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Improved by the run last season and ended with an excellent third of 11 in Doncaster's Group 2 Park Hill Stakes in September; yard took this 12 months ago and she's very much the one to beat."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Ryka (IRE)",

        "trainer": "David O'Meara",

        "fair_odds": "5.40",
        "best_dec": "6.00",
        "edge": "+1.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Enjoyed an excellent 2025 and she signed off with a 1m4f listed success at Toulouse in October; remains quite low mileage, so can do better still this season."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Tattycoram (GB)",
        "jockey": "Edward Greatrex",
        "trainer": "Ralph Beckett",
        "ts": "91",
        "rpr": "107",
        "or": "89",

        "stall": 2,

        "score": "61.6",
        "model_pct": "14.7%",
        "fair_odds": "6.81",
        "best_dec": "9.00",
        "edge": "+2.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Largely progressive sort (1m2f winner) last season but she wasn't seen out after posting just a fair fifth of seven in 1m6f Newmarket handicap in August; this demands a clear personal best after eight months off the track."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,

        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-2",

        "model_pct": "10.4%",
        "fair_odds": "9.58",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "+2.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Proved most progressive last season when a dual 1m4f AW handicap scorer in the autumn; steps up in grade here but she's capable of further improvement."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Kissmehoneyhoney (GB)",
        "jockey": "Daniel Muscutt",
        "trainer": "William Haggas",
        "ts": "56",
        "rpr": "96",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "1-",

        "dam_sire": "Sixties Icon",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "58.0",
        "model_pct": "9.8%",
        "fair_odds": "10.15",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "-2.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Crystal Ocean filly who looked a good prospect when making a winning start in 11-runner maiden at Leicester (1m2f, good to soft) in September; takes a big step up in grade but this longer trip promises to suit her well, so she shouldn't be passed over at all lightly for leading yard."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,

        "fair_odds": "14.19",
        "best_dec": "23.00",
        "edge": "+1.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Lightly raced filly who showed fair winning form in bumpers before making a successful Flat debut in 1m3f maiden at Kempton in March; capable of better but this demands considerable improvement."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,

        "ts": "87",

        "fair_odds": "17.63",
        "best_dec": "21.00",
        "edge": "+1.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Underwent breathing surgery before making an encouraging return from six months off when runner-up in 1m4f Kempton handicap last month; this fairly useful 1m4f winner can take a step forward now."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Looked firmly on the up when landing a pair of handicaps (around 1m3f) at Kempton and Yarmouth last autumn but she ended 2025 on a low note when tailed off in the St Simon Stakes at Newbury; this is no easy reappearance."
      },

      }

  {
    "course": "Newmarket",
    "time": "16:05",
    "race_name": "Betfred \"Nifty 50\" Handicap",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "7f",
    "going": "Good",
    "class": "Class 2",
    "draw_bias": "stands_side",
    "draw_strength": 4,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Golden Redemption",
        "jockey": "Silvestre De Sousa",
        "trainer": "Andrew Balding",
        "ts": "105",
        "rpr": "112",
        "or": "82",
        "form": "3123-3",
        "sire": "Medaglia d'Oro",
        "dam_sire": "Quality Road",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "8-5",
        "score": "63.7",
        "model_pct": "32.0%",
        "fair_odds": "3.13",
        "best_dec": "3.50",
        "edge": "+4.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Placed on all four handicap starts last year (7f/6f, good to firm/good), on the final occasion keeping on for 1l third here when the drop back to 6f looked against him; returned with solid third at Kempton (7f, AW) in March; major player for trainer who has won two of the last four runnings."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Elarak (GB)",
        "jockey": "Tom Marquand",
        "trainer": "Charles Hills",
        "ts": "85",
        "rpr": "111",
        "or": "103",
        "form": "1761-4",
        "sire": "Kingman",
        "dam_sire": "Teofilo",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-12",
        "score": "57.5",
        "model_pct": "14.1%",
        "fair_odds": "7.07",
        "best_dec": "4.00",
        "edge": "-11.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Made it 3-6 when winning a C&D handicap (good to firm) last September, making virtually all; gelded subsequently; reappeared with close fourth of eight in conditions race at Thirsk (7f, good) three weeks ago and could show the benefit of that outing today; this 4yo is firmly in calculations."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Shah",
        "jockey": "Billy Loughnane",
        "trainer": "George Boughey",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "89",
        "form": "2221/",
        "sire": "Sea The Stars",
        "dam_sire": "Motivator",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "8-12",
        "score": "56.3",
        "model_pct": "12.1%",
        "fair_odds": "8.27",
        "best_dec": "6.00",
        "edge": "-5.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Runner-up in 2024 on first three 2yo starts (7f/1m, good to firm/good to soft) before easily making all in 7f AW novice; off since, with gelding/wind ops in the meantime; it's a hefty absence to defy but he has potential off his opening mark if retaining his ability; the betting will be interesting."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Billyjoh (GB)",
        "jockey": "Harry Davies",
        "trainer": "Michael Appleby",
        "ts": "103",
        "rpr": "112",
        "or": "90",
        "form": "38638-",
        "sire": "Mayson",
        "dam_sire": "Kodiac",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "8-13",
        "score": "56.2",
        "model_pct": "12.0%",
        "fair_odds": "8.33",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "+2.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "His losing sequence goes back 22 races to February 2024; however, he's often run well in the interim and he's been given a bit of help from the handicapper ahead of this reappearance; can be in the mix if fully tuned up."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Silver Ghost (IRE)",
        "jockey": "David Egan",
        "trainer": "Emma Lavelle",
        "ts": "94",
        "rpr": "111",
        "or": "92",
        "form": "19066-",
        "sire": "Phoenix Of Spain",
        "dam_sire": "Green Desert",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "54.6",
        "model_pct": "9.7%",
        "fair_odds": "10.37",
        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "-0.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won over C&D (good) last May on her second start of last season and followed up at Goodwood (7f, good) later that month; she failed to kick on subsequently but perhaps a break will have helped and she's not discounted on her reappearance."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Leadman (GB)",
        "jockey": "Connor Planas(3)",
        "trainer": "David O'Meara",
        "ts": "104",
        "rpr": "110",
        "or": "83",
        "form": "78U6-8",
        "sire": "Kingman",
        "dam_sire": "Dansili",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "8-6",
        "score": "52.6",
        "model_pct": "7.5%",
        "fair_odds": "13.39",
        "best_dec": "9.50",
        "edge": "-4.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "He has a modest strike-rate for one of his ability (2-19) and needs everything to drop right; however, he's well treated on last year's best efforts and may have needed his recent reappearance run at Thirsk; not ruled out."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Benacre",
        "jockey": "Sean D Bowen",
        "trainer": "Charlie Johnston",
        "ts": "89",
        "rpr": "111",
        "or": "79",
        "form": "216035",
        "sire": "Australia",
        "dam_sire": "Footstepsinthesand",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "8-2",
        "score": "51.7",
        "model_pct": "6.6%",
        "fair_odds": "15.18",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-1.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Close third from the front at Musselburgh (7f, good) on April 12 and didn't lead when drawn wide and fifth of 11 there (7f, good) last Sunday; could give a good account if usual prominent tactics are applied but there's a suspicion he's vulnerable up in grade."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Misunderstood (FR)",
        "jockey": "Daniel Tudhope",
        "trainer": "David O'Meara",
        "ts": "92",
        "rpr": "110",
        "or": "90",
        "form": "09096-",
        "sire": "Hello Youmzain",
        "dam_sire": "Observatory",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "8-13",
        "score": "51.0",
        "model_pct": "6.1%",
        "fair_odds": "16.46",
        "best_dec": "21.00",
        "edge": "+1.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won 1m 2yo Group 3 at Longchamp in 2024; reappeared with good third in Group 3 there last April; form went the wrong way subsequently and he changed hands for 37,000euros last November; gelded since; however, his new yard does extremely well with French recruits and this 4yo has an attractive mark to work with if tapping back into his historic promise; watch the betting."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Ascot",
    "time": "16:20",

      {

        "best_dec": "6.50",

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Narrow Newcastle win on her penultimate start; did best of the rest behind an emphatic all-the-way winner at Yarmouth three weeks ago (5f, good); this race should be more conventional and she is more appealing than many."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Artagnan",

        "edge": "-5.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Two solid placed efforts have followed his AW win (6f; dead-heated) at Chelmsford last October; still has relatively low mileage and a promising claimer has been booked; first 5f run since his 2yo days."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Rage Of Thunder (IRE)",

        "ts": "88",
        "rpr": "98",

        "stall": 17,

        "score": "57.4",
        "model_pct": "7.6%",
        "fair_odds": "13.10",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "-2.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Not without his quirks but he has plenty of ability for one of his rating and everything clicked in a Class 6 handicap at Salisbury last June (6f, good to firm); three second placings followed and he should win more races this year; the drop back to 5f for this habitual slow-starter is a concern though."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "All Ways Glamorous (GB)",

        "stall": 14,
        "weight": "9-10",
        "score": "57.2",
        "model_pct": "7.5%",
        "fair_odds": "13.34",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-1.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Second of 16 in a C&D handicap last September; followed that with a good run at Haydock but he went up the weights and was well beaten at Lingfield when last seen; ran well after an absence last year but perhaps a shade high in the weights for this."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Another Abbot (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Cieren Fallon",
        "trainer": "William Haggas",
        "ts": "78",
        "rpr": "96",

        "stall": 6,

        "score": "57.1",
        "model_pct": "7.5%",
        "fair_odds": "13.39",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "-3.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Effective at 5f but last summer's two wins came over 6f; not beaten far at Chelmsford (5f) when last seen in December; still has relatively low mileage."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Combustion",
        "jockey": "Joey Haynes",
        "trainer": "Chelsea Banham",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "98",
        "or": "77",
        "form": "3-1112",

        "dam_sire": "Firebreak",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "56.9",
        "model_pct": "7.3%",
        "fair_odds": "13.63",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "-2.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "His first three starts saw him well beaten over 7f but he has not looked back since dropped to 6f, winning seven times and placed on his other three runs; could only manage second at Chelmsford five weeks ago but the horse to beat him is now rated 17lb higher and that shouldn't be used as evidence he is in the handicapper's grip; more to prove back on turf and at a new trip but few arrive in better form."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Far Above The Law",

        "trainer": "Michael Herrington",
        "ts": "97",
        "rpr": "96",

        "stall": 13,

        "score": "55.8",
        "model_pct": "6.7%",
        "fair_odds": "14.85",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-1.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Well handicapped on his best form for Alice Haynes and he made an encouraging stable debut when a close third at Southwell three weeks ago; one to be interested in."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,

        "fair_odds": "15.29",
        "best_dec": "23.00",

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Had a troubled trip when down the field at Wolverhampton in February but he had been running well beforehand, including a couple of AW wins; others appeal as being better handicapped."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,

        "fair_odds": "16.02",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "-0.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ended a lengthy losing run at Southwell in January and he is just 1lb higher today; solid effort at Newmarket 17 days ago when not ideally positioned; each-way claims at a track where he has run well in much better races than this one."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,
        "horse": "Hockney",
        "jockey": "Pierre-Louis Jamin",
        "trainer": "Tom Dascombe",
        "ts": "87",
        "rpr": "97",
        "or": "77",
        "form": "7511-9",

        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "53.6",
        "model_pct": "5.7%",
        "fair_odds": "17.50",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "-3.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Down the field in three maiden/novice runs but he proved a different proposition on his handicap debut last September (6f, AW; first run after wind surgery), landing a gamble in emphatic fashion; followed up, again easily, in a selling handicap at Thirsk one week later; came up short off his revised mark at Newcastle five weeks ago (first run for 193 days); better than that but dropping to 5f asks a new question of him."
      },
      {
        "rank": 11,
        "horse": "Gallant (FR)",
        "jockey": "Jamie Spencer",
        "trainer": "Oli Rix",
        "ts": "76",
        "rpr": "96",
        "or": "86",
        "form": "60-626",

        "dam_sire": "Tiger Hill",
        "stall": 15,
        "weight": "9-10",
        "score": "51.0",
        "model_pct": "4.7%",
        "fair_odds": "21.21",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "-1.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Both wins and most of his best RPRs have come on AW but his turf runs have come in stronger company than this; drops to 5f for the first time in his career; others look safer."
      },
      {

        "edge": "-5.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ran a fine race when third over C&D last July and he turns up here off an 8lb lower mark; poorly drawn when down the field at Lingfield on Good Friday; could bounce back with a big run."

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Not handicapped out of things and his latest run at Pontefract, his first start for 12 weeks, was creditable; twice a course winner and likely to make a bold bid."
      },

        "edge": "-0.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Second in this race last year before running out the ready winner of a 5f AW handicap at Haydock last May (good to firm) off a 1lb lower mark; made an encouraging return to action at Beverley 16 days ago; each-way shout."
      },

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Made a winning debut for this yard at Newmarket last July (5f, good to firm) and he is now 3lb lower; patchy record since but he can go well fresh and he has a good C&D run on his record."

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ran quite well when an unconsidered 100-1 shot at Royal Ascot last summer but that didn't prove a springboard to better things; down in the weights but best watched back from a 245-day break."
      }

        "run_style": "",

        "spotlight": "Low-mileage 4yo who got back on the up when making a winning return in 6f Newcastle handicap 18 days ago; up 3lb but had a bit in hand there and merits serious consideration."

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "On a long losing sequence but he made a good start for his new yard (formerly with Darryll Holland) when second of nine in 6f Leicester handicap 18 days ago; more is needed from 3lb out of the handicap here though."

        "spotlight": "Ended 2025 on the up and he returned from seven months off (gelded) with an encouraging fourth of 13 in 6f handicap at Newmarket 16 days ago; well in the mix off the same mark."

      }
