  {
    "course": "Newmarket",
    "time": "16:40",
    "race_name": "Pertemps Network King Charles II Stakes (Listed Race)",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "7f",
    "going": "Good",
    "class": "Class 1",
    "draw_bias": "stands_side",
    "draw_strength": 4,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Cerro Blanco",
        "jockey": "Billy Loughnane",
        "trainer": "Charlie Appleby",
        "ts": "67",
        "rpr": "101",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "1",
        "sire": "Wootton Bassett",
        "dam_sire": "Dubawi",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "66.1",
        "model_pct": "28.3%",
        "fair_odds": "3.53",
        "best_dec": "2.63",
        "edge": "-13.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Sent off the 4-9 favourite when winning on debut over C&D (good) 17 days ago; his dam was a Listed winner and he's entered in the St James's Palace Stakes; could have lots more to offer for leading stable; strong claims."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Stellar Sunrise (GB)",
        "jockey": "Oisin Murphy",
        "trainer": "Andrew Balding",
        "ts": "97",
        "rpr": "110",
        "or": "103",
        "form": "3115-1",
        "sire": "Space Blues",
        "dam_sire": "Invincible Spirit",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "65.4",
        "model_pct": "25.7%",
        "fair_odds": "3.89",
        "best_dec": "3.00",
        "edge": "-11.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won in good style in a big field on nursery debut at York (7f, good to firm) last August and soft ground may not have suited in the Group 3 Horris Hill at Newbury in October; returned with commanding handicap win at Newbury (7f, good) a fortnight ago and holds leading form claims."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Saber Strike (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Tom Marquand",
        "trainer": "William Haggas",
        "ts": "73",
        "rpr": "99",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "1-",
        "sire": "Night Of Thunder",
        "dam_sire": "Oasis Dream",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "64.3",
        "model_pct": "22.1%",
        "fair_odds": "4.53",
        "best_dec": "5.50",
        "edge": "-0.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "230,000gns yearling who was backed into 5-2 when readily making a winning debut at Redcar (6f, good) last November; he's entered in the 6f Group 1 Commonwealth Cup but there's every chance he'll be suited by 7f and this highly likeable prospect is in good hands to progress; one to consider."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Jel Pepper",
        "jockey": "Hector Crouch",
        "trainer": "Oliver Cole",
        "ts": "105",
        "rpr": "110",
        "or": "99",
        "form": "3471-4",
        "sire": "Inns Of Court",
        "dam_sire": "Footstepsinthesand",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "58.0",
        "model_pct": "9.6%",
        "fair_odds": "10.43",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "-2.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Front-runner who had nearly 2l to spare when winning 26-runner sales race over C&D (good); held in fourth of seven on reappearance in Listed race at Newcastle (1m, AW) but could benefit from that run and the drop back in trip; no surprise to see a bold bid back on the Rowley Mile."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Ellusive Butterfly",
        "jockey": "Clifford Lee",
        "trainer": "K R Burke",
        "ts": "89",
        "rpr": "109",
        "or": "96",
        "form": "43-124",
        "sire": "Invincible Army",
        "dam_sire": "Tamayuz",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "57.6",
        "model_pct": "9.1%",
        "fair_odds": "10.95",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "+2.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "7f AW maiden winner who was fourth of 14 in the Group 3 Fred Darling at Newbury (7f, good) a fortnight ago; she's raced five times and others may have greater potential, while she could do with settling better, but she appears to be improving and might not be far away."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Maximized (GB)",
        "jockey": "Connor Planas",
        "trainer": "Charlie Appleby",
        "ts": "99",
        "rpr": "103",
        "or": "98",
        "form": "55-323",
        "sire": "Mehmas",
        "dam_sire": "Pivotal",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "53.4",
        "model_pct": "5.2%",
        "fair_odds": "19.26",
        "best_dec": "26.00",
        "edge": "+1.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won his first two starts last May/June then fifth in a pair of Group 2 races; twice placed at Meydan early this year but beaten about 6l when third of five in conditions race over this C&D (good) recently and Cerro Blanco may well be the yard's chief hope under Billy Loughnane."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Newcastle (AW)",
    "time": "16:45",
    "race_name": "Quaff Box Handicap",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "AW",
    "dist": "1m2f",
    "going": "Standard",
    "class": "Class 6",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 2,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Fallacious Promise (GB)",
        "jockey": "Luke Morris",
        "trainer": "John Butler",
        "ts": "46",
        "rpr": "70",
        "or": "50",
        "form": "905-92",
        "sire": "Lope Y Fernandez",
        "dam_sire": "Byron",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "8-8",
        "score": "52.2",
        "model_pct": "21.7%",
        "fair_odds": "4.61",
        "best_dec": "3.00",
        "edge": "-15.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "First signs of life when coming home strongly, upped to 1m, for second in a Kempton 0-55 in February (race worked out fairly among the principals); stamina not assured on pedigree, upped 3lb, but his claims are obvious otherwise for a yard enjoying a good spring."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Skirt Around (USA)",
        "jockey": "Cam Hardie",
        "trainer": "Philip Kirby",
        "ts": "61",
        "rpr": "70",
        "or": "65",
        "form": "643-",
        "sire": "Knicks Go",
        "dam_sire": "Candy Ride",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "51.7",
        "model_pct": "20.1%",
        "fair_odds": "4.96",
        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "+8.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Not without hope in three 7f runs in the space of a few weeks last September, including here, since when she's undergone wind surgery; starts handicap life at a sensible level and the market should tell a tale for a yard also responsible for Project Kinsman."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Central Command (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Paul Mulrennan",
        "trainer": "Simon & Ed Crisford",
        "ts": "41",
        "rpr": "74",
        "or": "64",
        "form": "755-",
        "sire": "Space Blues",
        "dam_sire": "Shamardal",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "50.8",
        "model_pct": "17.9%",
        "fair_odds": "5.59",
        "best_dec": "2.75",
        "edge": "-18.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Half-brother to three winners, including on Tapeta; gelded since well held in three 7f runs at Kempton late last year (big prices each time); goes in first-time headgear and this is more realistic."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Project Kinsman",
        "jockey": "Aiden Brookes",
        "trainer": "Philip Kirby",
        "ts": "47",
        "rpr": "69",
        "or": "49",
        "form": "98-82",
        "sire": "Maxfield",
        "dam_sire": "Tapizar",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "8-7",
        "score": "48.6",
        "model_pct": "13.4%",
        "fair_odds": "7.47",
        "best_dec": "9.00",
        "edge": "+2.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Better on her C&D handicap debut here 18 days ago, upped from 7f, and is 1lb lower tonight; winner and third that night have let the side down since but that gave something to build on."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Sweet Love (GB)",
        "jockey": "Andrew Mullen",
        "trainer": "Charlie Johnston",
        "ts": "59",
        "rpr": "70",
        "or": "56",
        "form": "557-65",
        "sire": "Dream Ahead",
        "dam_sire": "Montjeu",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "46.0",
        "model_pct": "9.5%",
        "fair_odds": "10.54",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "+1.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Exposed, regressive maiden who again finished weakly on her first crack at 1m4f two months ago; handicapper giving her every chance but she's vulnerable to improvers and not obviously fancied."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Ballon Rouge",
        "jockey": "P J McDonald",
        "trainer": "Ed Dunlop",
        "ts": "44",
        "rpr": "72",
        "or": "57",
        "form": "486-6",
        "sire": "Masar",
        "dam_sire": "Oasis Dream",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "45.9",
        "model_pct": "9.4%",
        "fair_odds": "10.65",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "+3.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Beaten a long way on her Wolverhampton handicap debut early last month but didn't look to see out 1m4f having gone to the front off the home turn; 4lb lower and she ought to fare better."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Steel Fixer",
        "jockey": "Ben Robinson",
        "trainer": "Brian Ellison",
        "ts": "30",
        "rpr": "69",
        "or": "55",
        "form": "096-74",
        "sire": "Too Darn Hot",
        "dam_sire": "Selkirk",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "8-13",
        "score": "39.9",
        "model_pct": "4.3%",
        "fair_odds": "23.25",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "-2.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Quite well related, being a half-brother to three AW winners; overraced and hit traffic in a messy Wolverhampton handicap (1m4f) on his AW debut ten days ago, but that was at least a step up on his turf efforts."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Regal Knight (GB)",
        "jockey": "Barry McHugh",
        "trainer": "Tony Coyle & Kaine Wood",
        "ts": "25",
        "rpr": "63",
        "or": "52",
        "form": "078-",
        "sire": "Zoustar",
        "dam_sire": "Iffraaj",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "8-10",
        "score": "38.9",
        "model_pct": "3.7%",
        "fair_odds": "26.72",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "-3.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Huge prices and well beaten in three runs last autumn; this more realistic back from seven months off, now handicapping off a lowly opening mark, but would want to see some support before considering him."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Ascot",
    "time": "16:55",
    "race_name": "Darley British EBF Fillies' Novice Stakes (GBB Race)",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "1m",
    "going": "Good To Firm",
    "class": "Class 2",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 4,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "So Regal (GB)",
        "jockey": "Ryan Moore",
        "trainer": "John & Thady Gosden",
        "ts": "50",
        "rpr": "95",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "3-1",
        "sire": "Kingman",
        "dam_sire": "Dansili",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "67.6",
        "model_pct": "30.3%",
        "fair_odds": "3.29",
        "best_dec": "1.91",
        "edge": "-20.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Top-class pedigree and holds a Coronation Stakes entry; clear promise on debut and again went off market leader when making no mistake in a 1m maiden at Newmarket's Craven meeting (good), emerging from off the pace to quicken past Lyrics Of Life under no more than hands and heels encouragement from Ryan Moore; penalised accordingly but she's highly promising."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Gesayed",
        "jockey": "William Buick",
        "trainer": "K R Burke",
        "ts": "69",
        "rpr": "85",
        "or": "77",
        "form": "1-3",
        "sire": "Dark Angel",
        "dam_sire": "Sepoy",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "60.9",
        "model_pct": "19.3%",
        "fair_odds": "5.17",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "+9.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Debut winner over 6f at Hamilton (good to soft); failed to justify a shade off odds-on when penalised at Southwell (7f AW) and that was disappointing, for all that a very slow pace might not have helped; bred to improve for this longer trip."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Crownright (GB)",
        "jockey": "Colin Keane",
        "trainer": "Ralph Beckett",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "86",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "3-",
        "sire": "Frankel",
        "dam_sire": "Dansili",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "56.0",
        "model_pct": "14.0%",
        "fair_odds": "7.16",
        "best_dec": "5.00",
        "edge": "-6.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Frankel filly; 15-2 for November's debut at Kempton (1m) where she kept on nicely once getting the hang of things in a race won by 1,000 Guineas entrant Abashiri; trainer is wasting no time in turning to headgear but brings potential into her second season."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Light Dreamer",
        "jockey": "Sean Levey",
        "trainer": "Richard Hannon",
        "ts": "53",
        "rpr": "87",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "25",
        "sire": "Lucky Vega",
        "dam_sire": "Acclamation",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "50.9",
        "model_pct": "9.9%",
        "fair_odds": "10.14",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "+2.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Half-sister to five winners; defied market weakness to go close in a 7f Kempton maiden in early April and was reportedly struck into when well held at Newbury (1m2f); this is no easy opportunity even with no excuses this time."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Lyrics Of Life (GB)",
        "jockey": "Rossa Ryan",
        "trainer": "Brian Meehan",
        "ts": "72",
        "rpr": "94",
        "or": "90",
        "form": "5225-2",
        "sire": "Pinatubo",
        "dam_sire": "Singspiel",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "50.2",
        "model_pct": "9.4%",
        "fair_odds": "10.58",
        "best_dec": "6.00",
        "edge": "-7.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Quality 2yo form on all sorts of ground, as her seconds where behind smart horses and she wasn't beaten too far in a French Group 3; she did have the run of things up front on her Newmarket return (1m maiden, good) but was still unable to contain the less exposed So Regal; a 6lb pull with the winner could make it interesting."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Machadadorp",
        "jockey": "James Doyle",
        "trainer": "Andrew Balding",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "-",
        "sire": "Mehmas",
        "dam_sire": "Redoute's Choice",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "8-13",
        "score": "49.3",
        "model_pct": "8.9%",
        "fair_odds": "11.28",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "+3.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Mehmas filly and the second foal out of a Group-placed 1m winner; bred to have a future but she'd need to be decidedly useful to take this on debut."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Annastarzy (GB)",
        "jockey": "Alec Voikhansky",
        "trainer": "Richard Hannon",
        "ts": "65",
        "rpr": "84",
        "or": "75",
        "form": "644-",
        "sire": "Sea The Stars",
        "dam_sire": "Dubawi",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "48.1",
        "model_pct": "8.2%",
        "fair_odds": "12.22",
        "best_dec": "23.00",
        "edge": "+2.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Confined to 1m last season and probably ran her best race last time out when fourth behind a very promising filly from the Haggas yard; seems sure to win races this term but this might not be one of them unless she can take a step forward."
      }
    ]
  },

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Much improved after three months off (also gelded) when making a winning start in handicaps at Wolverhampton (9.5f) last month, quickening clear impressively off a steady pace; up 6lb but he remains one to be very interested in on his turf debut."

  {
    "course": "Newmarket",
    "time": "17:15",
    "race_name": "Close Brothers Fillies' Handicap",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "6f",
    "going": "Good",
    "class": "Class 3",
    "draw_bias": "high",
    "draw_strength": 4,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Lady Roxby",
        "jockey": "Silvestre De Sousa",
        "trainer": "Michael Herrington",
        "ts": "87",
        "rpr": "91",
        "or": "83",
        "form": "2022-3",
        "sire": "King Of Change",
        "dam_sire": "Elnadim",
        "stall": 13,
        "weight": "9-12",
        "score": "62.6",
        "model_pct": "18.8%",
        "fair_odds": "5.31",
        "best_dec": "4.50",
        "edge": "-4.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Progressive last year, a campaign that culminated with a neck second of 11 over C&D (good); reappeared with solid third at Kempton (6f, AW) 25 days ago and could build on that effort today; respected."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Angel Love (GB)",
        "jockey": "David Egan",
        "trainer": "Kevin Philippart De Foy",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "89",
        "or": "83",
        "form": "231-",
        "sire": "Harry Angel",
        "dam_sire": "Iffraaj",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "57.5",
        "model_pct": "10.9%",
        "fair_odds": "9.16",
        "best_dec": "7.00",
        "edge": "-3.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Placed last September on first two 2yo starts (6f, AW) and easily made all in a maiden at Wolverhampton (6f, AW) in November when odds-on; brings potential to this handicap/turf debut and could have a part to play."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Paradise Walk (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Hector Crouch",
        "trainer": "Ralph Beckett",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "83",
        "or": "78",
        "form": "22-2",
        "sire": "Starman",
        "dam_sire": "Kodiac",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "8-11",
        "score": "56.9",
        "model_pct": "10.2%",
        "fair_odds": "9.84",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "-2.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Runner-up on all three starts (7f/6f, AW), most recently at Wolverhampton in March following an 82-day break; improvement is needed off her opening mark but there's potential in her pedigree and she's in the right hands to progress; wears first-time blinkers."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Cuban Lady (GB)",
        "jockey": "Oisin Murphy",
        "trainer": "Tom Clover",
        "ts": "84",
        "rpr": "92",
        "or": "76",
        "form": "15236-",
        "sire": "Havana Grey",
        "dam_sire": "Tamayuz",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "56.0",
        "model_pct": "9.2%",
        "fair_odds": "10.81",
        "best_dec": "8.50",
        "edge": "-2.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Not seen to best effect last October on final 3yo start but she'd previous gone close twice in a row, on the first occasion on the other Newmarket course (6f, good to firm); reappears with Oisin Murphy booked and this lightly raced filly may have more to offer this season; possible contender."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Lightning Polka (GB)",
        "jockey": "Tom Marquand",
        "trainer": "Ed Walker",
        "ts": "70",
        "rpr": "84",
        "or": "83",
        "form": "1703-",
        "sire": "Night Of Thunder",
        "dam_sire": "Elusive Quality",
        "stall": 11,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "55.4",
        "model_pct": "8.7%",
        "fair_odds": "11.50",
        "best_dec": "8.50",
        "edge": "-5.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Looked good when winning on debut at Haydock (6f, good) last September; didn't kick on subsequently and came third of four on handicap debut at Lingfield (6f, AW) in November last time, but maybe a break will have helped this half-sister to 6f Group 3 winner Light Refrain; yard in fine form."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Powdering",
        "jockey": "Connor Planas(3)",
        "trainer": "Michael Herrington",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "91",
        "or": "79",
        "form": "-69203",
        "sire": "Ribchester",
        "dam_sire": "Acclamation",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "53.5",
        "model_pct": "7.1%",
        "fair_odds": "14.11",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "-0.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Inconsistent on AW this year but she was short-headed at Lingfield (7f) in February and denied a clear run when third at Southwell (6f) last time; has won here and she might not be far away if she's on a going day."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Mercury Day",
        "jockey": "Jack Gilligan",
        "trainer": "Conrad Allen",
        "ts": "78",
        "rpr": "91",
        "or": "78",
        "form": "7453-7",
        "sire": "Time Test",
        "dam_sire": "Motivator",
        "stall": 10,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "52.8",
        "model_pct": "6.6%",
        "fair_odds": "15.11",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "-0.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Down the field at Kempton (6f, AW) 25 days ago but she was back from an absence and had a wide trip; close third on the other Newmarket course (6f, good to firm) last June on her final outing of last year, when tackling a sprint trip for the first time, and she's not written off."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Cinque Verde (GB)",
        "jockey": "Jack Doughty",
        "trainer": "Tony Carroll",
        "ts": "85",
        "rpr": "90",
        "or": "83",
        "form": "0144-8",
        "sire": "Sioux Nation",
        "dam_sire": "Holy Roman Emperor",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-12",
        "score": "52.6",
        "model_pct": "6.5%",
        "fair_odds": "15.49",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "-0.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Three wins last year and campaign concluded with good fourth of 11 over this C&D (good); down the field on reappearance at Wolverhampton (6f, AW) in March but may have needed the run and is not ruled out."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Fantasy Obsessor (GB)",
        "jockey": "Harry Davies",
        "trainer": "Michael Appleby",
        "ts": "81",
        "rpr": "85",
        "or": "68",
        "form": "6099-5",
        "sire": "Mayson",
        "dam_sire": "Due Diligence",
        "stall": 12,
        "weight": "8-11",
        "score": "50.6",
        "model_pct": "5.2%",
        "fair_odds": "19.25",
        "best_dec": "26.00",
        "edge": "+1.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "4yo who won last summer on her first two starts (6f/7f, AW); four lesser runs followed last year (turf/AW), however, and there was no return to form on her recent reappearance at Southwell (6f, AW)."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,
        "horse": "Orchid (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Billy Loughnane",
        "trainer": "George Boughey",
        "ts": "69",
        "rpr": "87",
        "or": "87",
        "form": "/1754-",
        "sire": "Blue Point",
        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "10-2",
        "score": "49.4",
        "model_pct": "4.6%",
        "fair_odds": "21.88",
        "best_dec": "19.00",
        "edge": "-1.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Made it 2-3 on AW when winning on handicap/seasonal debut at Wolverhampton (6f, AW) last April; then off until the autumn, when running some respectable races on turf; has to better that form to win off her current mark but this 4yo remains lightly raced and is not discounted."
      },
      {
        "rank": 11,
        "horse": "Lady Kodiac (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Clifford Lee",
        "trainer": "James Tate",
        "ts": "51",
        "rpr": "81",
        "or": "88",
        "form": "311-5",
        "sire": "Kodiac",
        "dam_sire": "Zamindar",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "49.3",
        "model_pct": "4.5%",
        "fair_odds": "22.17",
        "best_dec": "7.50",
        "edge": "-9.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Built upon last August's promising debut at Ripon (5f, good to firm) to post two novice wins at Chelmsford (6f, AW) in the autumn; only fifth of seven in conditions race at Wolverhampton (6f, AW) three weeks ago but may have needed that comeback run and she retains potential on handicap debut."
      },
      {
        "rank": 12,
        "horse": "Slay Queen (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Joe Leavy",
        "trainer": "Richard Hannon",
        "ts": "81",
        "rpr": "86",
        "or": "88",
        "form": "11075-",
        "sire": "Acclamation",
        "dam_sire": "Olympic Glory",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "48.1",
        "model_pct": "4.0%",
        "fair_odds": "24.99",
        "best_dec": "23.00",
        "edge": "-0.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won Newbury novice (6f, good) last August on third start and followed up in three-runner nursery at Goodwood (6f, heavy); faced some tough tasks subsequently and she reverts to a handicap for her reappearance in a race her trainer won last year; this 3yo could give a good account."
      },
      {
        "rank": 13,
        "horse": "Anaisa (GB)",
        "jockey": "David Allan",
        "trainer": "Tim Easterby",
        "ts": "76",
        "rpr": "84",
        "or": "84",
        "form": "1309-4",
        "sire": "Ardad",
        "dam_sire": "Kingman",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "47.4",
        "model_pct": "3.7%",
        "fair_odds": "27.05",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "-3.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "She ran 11 times last year and won twice, including Listed race at Ripon last August (6f, good; modest form for the grade); reappeared with 2l fourth of seven against males in handicap at Pontefract (6f, good) ten days ago and she has an each-way chance if building on that."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Newcastle (AW)",
    "time": "17:20",
    "race_name": "Get Your Free Bets @ freebets.com Handicap",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "AW",
    "dist": "1m2f",
    "going": "Standard",
    "class": "Class 5",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 2,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Say What You See",
        "jockey": "Billy Garritty",
        "trainer": "Liam Bailey",
        "ts": "54",
        "rpr": "88",
        "or": "75",
        "form": "211D-35",
        "sire": "Belardo",
        "dam_sire": "Dubawi",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "60.6",
        "model_pct": "24.1%",
        "fair_odds": "4.14",
        "best_dec": "2.38",
        "edge": "-19.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Two wins and a second from three runs on Tapeta, the second coming when clear with a progressive winner over C&D last August; turned over twice as favourite on turf this spring but holds decent claims once more."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Mao Shang Wong",
        "jockey": "Mark Winn",
        "trainer": "David O'Meara",
        "ts": "70",
        "rpr": "88",
        "or": "75",
        "form": "471104",
        "sire": "Too Darn Hot",
        "dam_sire": "Slade Power",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "55.6",
        "model_pct": "13.5%",
        "fair_odds": "7.43",
        "best_dec": "5.50",
        "edge": "-5.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Not seen it out over 1m4f a couple of times since two wins in March, one over C&D; it might just be that his current mark is beyond him but there won't be any excuses tonight."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "King Of Fury (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Sean Kirrane",
        "trainer": "Michael Dods",
        "ts": "72",
        "rpr": "84",
        "or": "73",
        "form": "626-76",
        "sire": "Starspangledbanner",
        "dam_sire": "Helmet",
        "stall": 10,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "52.8",
        "model_pct": "9.7%",
        "fair_odds": "10.26",
        "best_dec": "19.00",
        "edge": "+4.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Quite late in the day to be going beyond an extended 1m for the first time; often makes the running and can race freely, so will need to settle early from a wide stall back from ten weeks off; not in much form when last seen either way."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Star Cast",
        "jockey": "Joanna Mason",
        "trainer": "Gemma Tutty",
        "ts": "62",
        "rpr": "85",
        "or": "62",
        "form": "137163",
        "sire": "Almanzor",
        "dam_sire": "Pivotal",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "8-10",
        "score": "51.6",
        "model_pct": "8.5%",
        "fair_odds": "11.82",
        "best_dec": "9.50",
        "edge": "-4.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Two C&D wins already this year, latterly off 4lb lower, and continues in form, the drop to 1m working against her when she came home nicely at Doncaster five weeks ago; goes on the shortlist."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Sound Janet (GB)",
        "jockey": "Dylan Hogan",
        "trainer": "Julie Camacho",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "82",
        "or": "75",
        "form": "35225-",
        "sire": "Nathaniel",
        "dam_sire": "Workforce",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "51.6",
        "model_pct": "8.4%",
        "fair_odds": "11.88",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "-0.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Excuses when last seen but was otherwise expensive to follow for Roger Varian before picked up for 25,000gns in December; ran well first time out as a 2yo on Tapeta, though, and this mark should be within range if ready to go after six months off."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Jujubella (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Paul Mulrennan",
        "trainer": "Lucinda Russell & Michael Scudamore",
        "ts": "38",
        "rpr": "86",
        "or": "71",
        "form": "65776-",
        "sire": "Too Darn Hot",
        "dam_sire": "Shamardal",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "51.2",
        "model_pct": "8.1%",
        "fair_odds": "12.43",
        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "-3.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Progressive for cheekpieces going on early last year, with three course wins, latterly off a 4lb lower mark; again goes without the headgear back from six months off and there's nothing to suggest she's best caught fresh."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Sea The Light (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Luke Morris",
        "trainer": "John Butler",
        "ts": "50",
        "rpr": "81",
        "or": "75",
        "form": "19666-",
        "sire": "Sea The Stars",
        "dam_sire": "Dawn Approach",
        "stall": 11,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "49.1",
        "model_pct": "6.3%",
        "fair_odds": "15.97",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-1.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won a 7f maiden on this card last year on his racecourse debut; struggled subsequently but this is a bit easier down another 3lb in first-time blinkers (wore cheekpieces when last seen); yard also run Jack Sparowe."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Sure And Stedfast (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Aiden Brookes",
        "trainer": "Ewan Whillans",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "86",
        "or": "68",
        "form": "36182-",
        "sire": "Calyx",
        "dam_sire": "Nathaniel",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "48.4",
        "model_pct": "5.8%",
        "fair_odds": "17.34",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "-0.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Buzzy gelding who won twice on turf last year; only run once before on the AW but this mark should be within range if he keeps calm in a first-time hood back from six months off."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Free Speech (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Oisin Orr",
        "trainer": "Sam England",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "83",
        "or": "74",
        "form": "67293-",
        "sire": "Masar",
        "dam_sire": "Shirocco",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "47.3",
        "model_pct": "5.1%",
        "fair_odds": "19.59",
        "best_dec": "21.00",
        "edge": "+0.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Patchy during a limited campaign last year for Ed Dunlop; wins as a 3yo came on soft turf and this trip looks a bare minimum for her new yard on comeback."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,
        "horse": "Jack Sparowe (IRE)",
        "jockey": "P J McDonald",
        "trainer": "John Butler",
        "ts": "32",
        "rpr": "87",
        "or": "62",
        "form": "-99356",
        "sire": "Zoffany",
        "dam_sire": "Manduro",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "8-10",
        "score": "45.2",
        "model_pct": "4.0%",
        "fair_odds": "25.03",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "-2.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Not as good now and prone to the occasional off-day; still to win over C&D but his record suggests he needs considering off this mark, especially given his two previous runs in cheekpieces both resulted in near-misses."
      },
      {
        "rank": 11,
        "horse": "Haveyoumissedme (GB)",
        "jockey": "Andrew Mullen",
        "trainer": "Iain Jardine",
        "ts": "57",
        "rpr": "85",
        "or": "73",
        "form": "6-3527",

        "dam_sire": "Sir Percy",
        "stall": 12,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "45.0",
        "model_pct": "3.9%",
        "fair_odds": "25.83",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "-3.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Stays a deal further but has always liked it here and has run well a couple of times over C&D this year; a good pace would help but finished behind Say What You See on turf last time and others hold stronger claims."
      },
      {
        "rank": 12,
        "horse": "Natzor",
        "jockey": "David Nolan",
        "trainer": "Lizzie Quinlan",
        "ts": "53",
        "rpr": "84",
        "or": "70",
        "form": "8000-4",
        "sire": "Almanzor",
        "dam_sire": "Fastnet Rock",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "42.0",
        "model_pct": "2.7%",
        "fair_odds": "36.59",
        "best_dec": "26.00",
        "edge": "-0.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Wins for David O'Meara both came over C&D, including a division of this race two years ago; not beaten far at 100-1 here two months ago but looked flattered in a messy affair and he's generally struggled for this yard."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Ascot",
    "time": "17:30",
    "race_name": "Ascot Racecourse Supports Debra Manny Mercer Apprentice Handicap",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "1m",
    "going": "Good To Firm",
    "class": "Class 3",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 4,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Saytarr",
        "jockey": "Jack Callan",
        "trainer": "James Horton",
        "ts": "75",
        "rpr": "101",
        "or": "86",
        "form": "66-111",
        "sire": "Mehmas",
        "dam_sire": "Iffraaj",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "58.6",
        "model_pct": "19.2%",
        "fair_odds": "5.20",
        "best_dec": "5.00",
        "edge": "-1.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Five AW wins include this year's hat-trick on the Tapeta; raised a further 4lb for what was a narrow latest success (1m) but he's on a roll and no doubt a better horse now than when last seen on turf."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Tilted Kilt",
        "jockey": "Taylor Fisher",
        "trainer": "William Knight",
        "ts": "94",
        "rpr": "101",
        "or": "87",
        "form": "3028-1",
        "sire": "Persian King",
        "dam_sire": "Gleneagles",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "57.7",
        "model_pct": "16.8%",
        "fair_odds": "5.95",
        "best_dec": "9.50",
        "edge": "+6.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Went 0-14 after his winning debut at two but belatedly doubled his tally when comfortably accounting for his five rivals after a break at Southwell (1m); this is tougher, but he was runner-up in last year's Silver Bowl at Haydock which was a Class 2 handicap on turf; only 3lb higher than that day."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Dosman",
        "jockey": "Jack Dace(3)",
        "trainer": "Oli Rix",
        "ts": "40",
        "rpr": "104",
        "or": "92",
        "form": "-32124",
        "sire": "Kingman",
        "dam_sire": "Fastnet Rock",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-11",
        "score": "56.6",
        "model_pct": "14.3%",
        "fair_odds": "6.97",
        "best_dec": "5.50",
        "edge": "-5.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Only 2-16 but his third trainer has him in career-best form and didn't get the breaks when a closing fourth at Newcastle last time (1m); hold-up performer who needs a good pace to chase and if getting one he'll be dangerous."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Angel Hunter",
        "jockey": "Alec Voikhansky",
        "trainer": "Richard Hannon",
        "ts": "66",
        "rpr": "100",
        "or": "92",
        "form": "10-081",
        "sire": "Acclamation",
        "dam_sire": "Artie Schiller",
        "stall": 11,
        "weight": "9-11",
        "score": "55.6",
        "model_pct": "12.3%",
        "fair_odds": "8.13",
        "best_dec": "9.50",
        "edge": "+1.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Behind Dosman at Southwell when tried in new blinkers two runs ago but left that form behind with a narrow verdict at Lingfield (1m), which seemed unlikely from where he was turning in; only 3lb higher and he's a C&D winner."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Colombier",
        "jockey": "Harry Vigors(5)",
        "trainer": "Hamad Al Jehani",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "93",
        "form": "114/9-",
        "sire": "Kingman",
        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-12",
        "score": "52.4",
        "model_pct": "7.6%",
        "fair_odds": "13.19",
        "best_dec": "5.00",
        "edge": "-14.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won four times in France (7f-1m2f), twice in the Juddmonte silks and twice in these; absent since finishing ninth in Qatar in early 2025 so his wellbeing is a complete guessing game; best to let the betting guide; has form on soft and fast ground."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Greek Order",
        "jockey": "Taryn Langley(3)",
        "trainer": "Michael Bell",
        "ts": "93",
        "rpr": "105",
        "or": "93",
        "form": "4000-0",
        "sire": "Kingman",
        "dam_sire": "Empire Maker",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-12",
        "score": "51.9",
        "model_pct": "7.0%",
        "fair_odds": "14.30",
        "best_dec": "6.00",
        "edge": "-10.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Made the frame in three successive quality 1m handicaps last summer, including the Royal Hunt Cup here (good to firm); however, that campaign rather petered out and he was only midfield in the Lincoln a month ago (tried a visor); he's still dangerous to dismiss off this mark in a lower grade."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Herculeus (GB)",
        "jockey": "Ryan Kavanagh",
        "trainer": "William Muir & Chris Grassick",
        "ts": "83",
        "rpr": "102",
        "or": "84",
        "form": "14100-",
        "sire": "Expert Eye",
        "dam_sire": "Intello",
        "stall": 10,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "50.2",
        "model_pct": "5.4%",
        "fair_odds": "18.62",
        "best_dec": "21.00",
        "edge": "+0.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Tailed off in two races since winning off 7lb lower at Newbury last August (1m; in first-time cheekpieces which are now absent); might be high enough in the ratings even if all the better for being gelded; absent since October."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Storm Star",
        "jockey": "Alfie Redman(7)",
        "trainer": "Andrew Balding",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "104",
        "or": "95",
        "form": "13-660",
        "sire": "Night Of Thunder",
        "dam_sire": "Aqlaam",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "10-0",
        "score": "49.9",
        "model_pct": "5.2%",
        "fair_odds": "19.31",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "-2.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "All four wins have been on the AW at Newcastle, including a hat-trick early last year; back on his last winning mark and he did chase a strong pace last time (in a race he won 12 months earlier) before folding late on; lightly raced on turf."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Dapper Guest (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Harry Burns",
        "trainer": "George Margarson",
        "ts": "77",
        "rpr": "102",
        "or": "84",
        "form": "0149-0",
        "sire": "Dandy Man",
        "dam_sire": "Oasis Dream",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "49.1",
        "model_pct": "4.6%",
        "fair_odds": "21.77",
        "best_dec": "41.00",
        "edge": "+1.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Effective in the reapplied cheekpieces but last season's career-best form came once fitted in a visor; needs to be right on his game to win this and that wasn't the case on his Newmarket comeback."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,
        "horse": "Joolianoss (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Tom Kiely-Marshall(3)",
        "trainer": "James Evans",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "102",
        "or": "77",
        "form": "1195-2",

        "dam_sire": "Elusive Pimpernel",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "8-10",
        "score": "48.9",
        "model_pct": "4.4%",
        "fair_odds": "22.62",
        "best_dec": "26.00",
        "edge": "+0.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won three handicaps on the AW in January 2025 (1m-1m2f) and showed that he's still on a fair mark with a second at Kempton on final run this January; however, this is tougher than he's accustomed to and has to prove himself on turf."
      },
      {
        "rank": 11,
        "horse": "Dingle",
        "jockey": "Christian Howarth",
        "trainer": "Julie Camacho",
        "ts": "47",
        "rpr": "98",
        "or": "82",

        "dam_sire": "Daggers Drawn",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "46.7",
        "model_pct": "3.2%",
        "fair_odds": "31.35",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "-3.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Had the run of things when winning over Newcastle's 1m in January and has since finished behind both Dosman and Angel Hunter; goes to work today off his 8lb lower turf mark but that's because he's 0-15 on grass."
      }
    ]
  },

        "spotlight": "Running well on the AW in just a tongue-tie and has continued the good work over hurdles, finishing second (cheekpieces added) before a win 12 days ago (first-time visor); should have a part to play here."

        "spotlight": "Progressive juvenile hurdler this winter and returned to the Flat with a close third at Thirsk (1m4f, good); had no excuses but looks sure to win more races in this scene."

        "edge": "+2.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won back-to-back at Lingfield last August (2m/1m5f; good) after the cheekpieces went on but the last of those wins was by 12l and she's struggled since, presumably because of her new mark; others appeal more."
      },

        "best_dec": "1.73",
        "edge": "-34.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Powerful yard, who won this two years ago, had a few disappoint at short prices of late; this lightly raced 400,000gns yearling holds obvious claims, having been gelded since winning his novice last summer (highly tried a couple of times prior) though."
      },

        "best_dec": "6.50",

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",

      },

        "rank": 4,

        "edge": "+1.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won for blinkers first being fitted and did so again for them going back on over C&D two months ago; lacked consistency in recent times and there's not much wiggle room off this mark but he's capable if on a going day."
      },

        "spotlight": "200,000gns yearling; mixed messages as to what he achieved when well-held second in a 7f Newmarket novice in October but that's still the best form on offer and there should be more to come as a 3yo now gelded."
      },
      {

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "140,000gns yearling and a half-brother to the useful White Crown Star; dam unraced half-sister to winners Eleonora Duse (1m2f Group 2) and Scottish Stage (1m2f Listed; runner-up in Irish Oaks); has been gelded but he's nicely bred and in top hands."

  {
    "course": "Newcastle (AW)",
    "time": "19:02",
    "race_name": "Northumbria Leisure For Gaming Machines Handicap",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "AW",
    "dist": "6f",
    "going": "Standard",
    "class": "Class 4",
    "draw_bias": "low",
    "draw_strength": 2,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Dandy Breeze (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Paul Mulrennan",
        "trainer": "Bryan Smart",
        "ts": "71",
        "rpr": "88",
        "or": "77",
        "form": "2-1",
        "sire": "Dandy Man",
        "dam_sire": "Oasis Dream",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "63.8",
        "model_pct": "38.9%",
        "fair_odds": "2.57",
        "best_dec": "2.88",
        "edge": "-1.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Slowly away when second, beaten a nose, on his debut here in December (5f; 12-1); duly went one better when the odds-on favourite for another 5f novice here in January; gelded afterwards; makes his handicap debut over an extra furlong and off a mark that looks manageable; betting useful."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Numero Vingt",
        "jockey": "Luke Morris",
        "trainer": "Archie Watson",
        "ts": "76",
        "rpr": "84",
        "or": "78",
        "form": "5-1160",
        "sire": "Mehmas",
        "dam_sire": "Dream Ahead",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "54.7",
        "model_pct": "13.7%",
        "fair_odds": "7.30",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "+5.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won two 6f events on Polytrack in February; unplaced in both handicaps though and his latest 2lb drop isn't enough to tempt."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Starmade (IRE)",
        "jockey": "P J McDonald",
        "trainer": "Ed Dunlop",
        "ts": "60",
        "rpr": "78",
        "or": "80",
        "form": "321-3",
        "sire": "Starman",
        "dam_sire": "Zebedee",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "53.4",
        "model_pct": "11.8%",
        "fair_odds": "8.46",
        "best_dec": "3.50",
        "edge": "-16.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Improved with each of his three runs last autumn, getting off the mark in a 5f maiden here in October; plugged on for third in a 5.7f handicap at Bath (good to soft) on his reappearance two weeks ago, beaten nearly 5l at the finish; needs more to defy this mark but returning to AW may help."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "There's A Chance (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Kevin Stott",
        "trainer": "Kevin Ryan",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "83",
        "or": "75",
        "form": "74187-",
        "sire": "Magna Grecia",
        "dam_sire": "Cadeaux Genereux",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "52.3",
        "model_pct": "10.4%",
        "fair_odds": "9.59",
        "best_dec": "4.00",
        "edge": "-14.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Made a successful handicap debut at Hamilton (6f, good) last July off a 6lb lower mark and that form worked out nicely; ran in sales races on her final two starts in 2025, eighth of 21 at Naas and seventh of 14 at Goodwood (7f, good to soft); was challenging 1f out in the latter event before her stamina gave way; untried on AW and absent for 219 days but there could be more to come this year."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Loquella (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Oliver Stammers",
        "trainer": "Charlie Johnston",
        "ts": "55",
        "rpr": "81",
        "or": "76",
        "form": "1-26",
        "sire": "No Nay Never",
        "dam_sire": "Teofilo",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "49.6",
        "model_pct": "7.7%",
        "fair_odds": "13.06",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "-0.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "C&D win on debut and then ran well under a penalty at Wolverhampton; dropped away to finish sixth of the seven runners in a 7f handicap at Southwell in March; returning to 6f can help but not obviously well treated."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,

        "jockey": "Rhys Elliott(5)",
        "trainer": "Susan Corbett",
        "ts": "63",
        "rpr": "87",
        "or": "73",
        "form": "3401-0",

        "dam_sire": "Makfi",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "49.5",
        "model_pct": "7.5%",
        "fair_odds": "13.26",
        "best_dec": "29.00",
        "edge": "+2.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Off the mark at the fourth attempt when landing a modest fillies' novice over C&D in December; 66-1 and well beaten on last month's stable/handicap debut; best watched."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Logi Bear (IRE)",

        "trainer": "John Butler",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "86",

        "form": "05000-",

        "dam_sire": "Pivotal",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-4",

        "fair_odds": "17.70",
        "best_dec": "9.50",
        "edge": "-4.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Faced some stiff tasks as a 2yo after winning a Newmarket novice last May (6f, good); not on a bad mark on his best efforts now starting out for John Butler (sold out of Richard Hannon's stable for 20,000gns last October); has been gelded; betting to guide."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Stoic Poet (IRE)",

        "trainer": "Iain Jardine",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "85",

        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "8-12",
        "score": "44.5",

        "fair_odds": "23.41",
        "best_dec": "26.00",
        "edge": "-0.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "No immediate improvement for the switch to handicaps when eighth of nine over 7f at Haydock 216 days ago; his novice and maiden runs had threatened better though and he still has time to fulfil that promise; betting useful in a winnable race."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Newcastle (AW)",

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won his novice here by 5l and looked on a workable mark for his handicap debut at Wolverhampton but he never travelled after starting slowly; wouldn't judge him on that performance and could be given another chance."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Beale Street",

        "trainer": "Bryan Smart",

        "fair_odds": "5.40",
        "best_dec": "9.00",
        "edge": "+7.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "All four wins have been here but over 6f; he appears to stay 7f but had a shocker over C&D last time; that was too bad to be true in fairness."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "The Green Man (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Luke Morris",
        "trainer": "Philip Kirby",
        "ts": "77",
        "rpr": "93",
        "or": "73",
        "form": "327632",

        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "56.4",
        "model_pct": "16.1%",
        "fair_odds": "6.22",
        "best_dec": "6.50",
        "edge": "-1.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Close up behind Beale Street here in March (6f) and produced a similar effort from off the pace to be runner-up over C&D 11 days ago; needs a good pace to chase (stays 1m) and no guarantee that he'll get one here."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Pressure's On",
        "jockey": "P J McDonald",
        "trainer": "Ed Dunlop",
        "ts": "68",
        "rpr": "92",
        "or": "79",

        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "52.8",
        "model_pct": "11.3%",
        "fair_odds": "8.86",
        "best_dec": "4.50",
        "edge": "-10.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Didn't appear to be crying out for the return to 1m at Doncaster and weakened late on; this is his trip, over which he was twice runner-up at Wolverhampton in March; not handicapped out of it, either."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,

        "ts": "31",
        "rpr": "90",

        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "-0.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Again he was slowly away when never dangerous here a month ago; inconsistent no matter how he breaks and, although capable off this mark, he comes with risks."
      },

  {
    "course": "Newcastle (AW)",
    "time": "20:10",
    "race_name": "Ride For Tommie Jakes Racing Club Memorial Handicap",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "AW",
    "dist": "6f",
    "going": "Standard",
    "class": "Class 5",
    "draw_bias": "low",
    "draw_strength": 2,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Raft Up",
        "jockey": "Ethan Tindall(5)",
        "trainer": "Harriet Bethell",
        "ts": "70",
        "rpr": "81",
        "or": "68",
        "form": "6-3281",
        "sire": "Dandy Man",
        "dam_sire": "Dark Angel",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "58.7",
        "model_pct": "20.8%",
        "fair_odds": "4.80",
        "best_dec": "5.50",
        "edge": "-0.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Good efforts in all three 6f runs this year, placed behind the prolific Yorkshire Glory twice and readily seeing off five rivals at Southwell eight days ago; 1lb well in under a penalty; should go well."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Caragio",
        "jockey": "William Carson",
        "trainer": "Adam Kirby",
        "ts": "65",
        "rpr": "83",
        "or": "71",
        "form": "776-21",
        "sire": "Caravaggio",
        "dam_sire": "More Than Ready",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-10",
        "score": "58.4",
        "model_pct": "20.3%",
        "fair_odds": "4.93",
        "best_dec": "2.50",
        "edge": "-21.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Began his 3yo campaign with a BHA mark of 93; a lot of water has flowed under the bridge since but he has bounced back to form for Adam Kirby, finishing second at Chelmsford in March (7f) before an easy win at Yarmouth ten days ago (6f, good to firm); 3lb well in under a penalty; obvious chance."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Lion's House (GB)",
        "jockey": "Kaiya Fraser",
        "trainer": "Linda Perratt",
        "ts": "72",
        "rpr": "81",
